positive: Minimalist abstract celestial landscape, featuring a stylized crescent moon and a group of gently scattered constellations represented by glowing geometric line art (gold leaf effect). The background is a deep midnight indigo, transitioning smoothly into violet and royal blue hues. Composition should be centralized and balanced, with the main subject occupying the upper two-thirds. Use clean, strong silhouettes and negative space. The style should be reminiscent of modern luxury scientific illustration and cosmic mandalas. High contrast, glowing luminosity, highly detailed print texture, perfect for screen printing on dark fabric. Octane render, vector art quality, --ar 1:1
